_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, reviewing harvested metadata, curating business context, and managing access.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. Skill DQ-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-003 (DQ, cosine: 0.443), AG-S-006 (AG, cosine: 0.441).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.377). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. NICE-only terms [analysis, binary, performing] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.915, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.067 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in performing binary analysis" and "Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, re". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.465 > STS 0.377 (gap +0.088). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [skill]. NICE-only: [analysis, binary, performing]. WIDAI-only: [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.8% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
